name: PostWizard AI
description: « This AI assistant helps you write effective posts for X (Twitter) You provide your idea, and the tool adapts the tone, adds hooks, hashtags, and marketing structure to maximize engagement

name: AdsTurbo AI Ads
description: « A solution designed for e-commerce brands that want to quickly create high-performing ads. Generate UGC videos, promotional ads, and social media-friendly creatives in minutes

name: Song Maker AI
description: « A platform that helps you compose songs by generating melodies, chords, and rhythms based on your musical preferences. Edit the elements of your creation, export, and use the tracks as a basis for your projects

name: Qwen 3.5
description: « This large multimodal model combines text, vision, and interface interaction in a single system, enabling it to understand screenshots, videos, and documents. It can also reason in multiple steps and handle over 200 languages

name: Gologin Cloud Browser
description: « A cloud browser designed for AI agents and automation workflows, with persistent sessions, APIs, and human-like browser behavior

name: Live3D AI Face Swap
description: « Easily swap faces in photos, GIFs, or videos, with unlimited replacements and no watermarks. You can also generate creative images using AI for your montages

name: DeVoice
description: « Convert any audio or video to plain text with unlimited AI transcription and no registration required. The tool also removes background noise, filters advanced noise, and offers a rap lyrics generator to easily create or clean up your audio content

name: BeatViz AI
description: « A smart studio for creating music videos synchronized to your audio, via a prompt or by importing a song directly. Easily export in portrait, square, or landscape format and assemble scenes on a timeline

name: MiniMax M2.5
description: « An LLM model that handles complex reasoning, agents, tools, and long contexts. It adapts to tasks such as chatting, coding, searching, or productivity assistance

name: Findtube.AI
description: « A search engine dedicated to YouTube videos that can identify a specific passage from a simple description. The results point directly to the most relevant content to save time

name: Rankin AI
description: « An AI tool that shows you where your content appears in AI-generated search results and tells you how to improve your visibility and ranking on these platforms (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, etc.)

name: Seedream 5.0
description: « Generate or edit high-resolution images with a template that keeps characters and styles consistent across multiple visuals. Handy for storyboards, comics, campaigns, or illustration series

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
